doc_title: Minimod: A Finite Difference solver for Seismic Modeling

items.fact: de la Cruz and Araya-Polo proposed the semi-stencil algorithm [6]
items.evidence_span: de la Cruz and Araya-Polo proposed the semi-stencil algorithm 6]

items.fact: Rivera et al. [16] showed that tiling 3D stencil combined with array padding could significantly reduce miss rates
items.evidence_span: Rivera et al. [16] showed that tiling 3D stencil combined with array padding could significantly reduce miss rates

items.fact: Nguyen et al. [14] introduced higher dimension cache optimizations
items.evidence_span: Nguyen et al. [14] introduced higher dimension cache optimizations

items.fact: Ghosh et al. [77] analyzed the performance and programmability of three high-level directive-based GPU programming models
items.evidence_span: Ghosh et al. 77 analyzed the performance and programmability of three high-level directive-based GPU programming models

items.fact: Qawasmeh et al. [15] implemented an MPI plus OpenACC approach for seismic modeling and RTM
items.evidence_span: Qawasmeh et al. [15] implemented an MPI plus OpenACC approach for seismic modeling and RTM

items.fact: Louboutin et al. introduced Devito [12], which a new domain-specific language for implementing differential equation solvers
items.evidence_span: Louboutin et al. introduced Devito [12], which a new domain-specific language for implementing differential equation solvers

items.fact: de la Cruz and Araya-Polo proposed an accurate performance model for a wide range of stencil sizes [5]
items.evidence_span: de la Cruz and Araya-Polo proposed an accurate performance model for a wide range of stencil sizes which captures the behavior of such 3D stencil computation pattern using platform parameters [5]
